get.description:
Get list of available configurations (not deleted).

Returns a paginated list of configurations with sorting support.
Only returns non-deleted configurations.
Get the current  active (draft) configuration
Get current draft configuration metadata without content.

post.description:
Create a draft from a specific configuration.

Creates a new draft configuration based on the specified configuration ID.

Promotes the draft to a regular configuration by creating a new Configuration record.
Optionally provide a name for the published configuration.
Reset draft to match source configuration. Sets is_modified to false.

get.description: Export complete system state to JSON with nested configuration structure.

post.description: Import system state from JSON.

get.description:
Get guardrail logs with optional filtering.

Supports filtering by guardrail name, stage, decision, similarity range, and timestamp range.

Get comprehensive guardrail statistics.

Aggregates statistics from logs including:
- Total checks, blocks, allows
- Block rate
- Per-guardrail breakdown
- Response times

Get similarity score distribution for visualization.

Provides comprehensive analytics including:
- Histogram distribution by decision (blocked vs allowed)
- Thresholds (global + per-category)
- Category-specific statistics
- False positive/negative analysis
- Decision path tracking (regex/embedding/both)
- Regex rule contribution metrics
Download log entries matching the current filter as a CSV file.
Get embedding guardrail statistics byt category

Get all guardrail types and their enabled status.

Reads from guardrails configuration to list all defined guardrails.

Get effectiveness metrics for each guardrail.
Shows how effective each guardrail is at blocking content.

Get statistics for standalone phrases.
Shows which phrases are triggering most frequently.
Proxy GET /v1/models to LiteLLM.

post.description: Proxy POST /v1/chat/completions to LiteLLM with retries on connection error.

Compute embedding vectors for all examples in the current embedding config and store in the database.

Idempotent: if the config and model have not changed since the last computation, returns
the existing stats without recomputing

get.description: Get embedding guardrail configuration.

post.description: Update embedding guardrail configuration.
Batch-add embedding examples to the draft config.
Test a new example before adding it
Add example to embedding guardrail config.

put.description: Update example in embedding guardrail config.

post.description: Delete example from embedding guardrail config.

delete.description: Delete a category and all its examples from embedding guardrail config.

get.description: Get current language validation configuration.
Get PII detection statistics from logs.
Get PII detection configuration.

post.description: Add a new custom PII type.
Test a regex pattern against sample text.
Test PII detection on sample text.
Test text against all guardrails.
Workflow: Test text → If not blocked → Create guardrail → Select threshold.

get.description: Get all guardrail configurations with detailed info.

post.description: Add a new guardrail to guardrails.json.
Add keyword to existing guardrail.
Update guardrail keywords and metadata (name, description, patterns).
Generate/create a new guardrail from topic and items.
Toggle guardrail enabled state.

get.description: Get enabled status for a guardrail.

put.description: Set enabled status for a guardrail.

post.description: Test text against a specific guardrail topic.
Suggest new terms to extend a keyword list using LLM.

get.description: Get all configured standalone dangerous phrases.

post.description: Add a new standalone dangerous phrase.
Create a new standalone phrase category.
Add a named entity to context analysis config.

delete.description: Remove a named entity from context analysis config.

get.description: Get all context analysis signals (educational, advocacy).

post.description: Add an educational context signal.
Add an advocacy context signal.

put.description: Update threshold modifiers for context analysis.

post.description: Check text for standalone dangerous phrases.
Analyze text context (educational, advocacy, named entities).
Generate semantic variations of a phrase using LLM.
Analyze false negative patterns for auto-promotion candidates.
Promote a pattern to standalone phrase.

get.description: Get advanced guardrails configuration.

post.description: Generate guardrail suggestions using LLM directly (bypasses all guardrails).

get.description: Return the list of available models from the workbench LiteLLM instance.
Get available LLM models.

post.description: Parse and upload a test dataset.
Generate adversarial test variants using LLM red-teaming.

Enqueue test execution for background processing.
Returns 202 Accepted immediately; poll /session/{id}/status for progress.
Evaluate test results and group failures by various dimensions.
Generate improvement suggestions. ADVISORY ONLY.

get.description: Generate comprehensive test report.
List all test sessions with pagination.
Poll session execution status.

delete.description: Delete a test session (CASCADE removes result row).

get.description: Health check endpoint.
Get platform and guardrail version information.
